Package Index | Class Index
public static interface

BinderInternal.Observer

com.android.internal.os.BinderInternal.Observer

Class Overview

Allows to track various steps of an API call.

Summary

Public Methods
abstract void callEnded(BinderInternal.CallSession s, int parcelRequestSize, int parcelReplySize, int workSourceUid)
Called when a binder call stops.
abstract BinderInternal.CallSession callStarted(Binder binder, int code, int workSourceUid)
Called when a binder call starts.
abstract void callThrewException(BinderInternal.CallSession s, Exception exception)
Called if an exception is thrown while executing the binder transaction.

Public Methods

public abstract void callEnded (BinderInternal.CallSession s, int parcelRequestSize, int parcelReplySize, int workSourceUid)

Called when a binder call stops.

  • This method will be called even when an exception is thrown by the binder stub implementation.

    Parameters
    s BinderInternal.CallSession
    parcelRequestSize int
    parcelReplySize int
    workSourceUid int

    • public abstract BinderInternal.CallSession callStarted (Binder binder, int code, int workSourceUid)

    Called when a binder call starts.

    Parameters
    binder Binder
    code int
    workSourceUid int
    Returns
    BinderInternal.CallSession a CallSession to pass to the callEnded method.

    public abstract void callThrewException (BinderInternal.CallSession s, Exception exception)

    Called if an exception is thrown while executing the binder transaction.

  • BinderCallsStats#callEnded will be called afterwards.
  • Do not throw an exception in this method, it will swallow the original exception thrown by the binder transaction.

    Parameters
    s BinderInternal.CallSession
    exception Exception
